layers.description: Inviolable principles that all agents must follow. Always included in system prompts.
Core concepts essential for the agent's role. Summaries always in prompt; agents can consult for details.
Contextual knowledge shown as a menu in the prompt. Agents see titles/summaries and can request full content.
Detailed guidance specific to each agent's role. Loaded when agent is activated or on explicit request.
Large corpus for RAG-based search. Agents must explicitly query using consult_knowledge tool.
